ocr_findings.description: Image mascot/icon for the 試験にはコレが出る box is an image placeholder. The three bullet points inside the box are all correctly captured in OCR text.

OCR renders 'スポンサー' (with long vowel mark ー) as 'スポンサー' — actually consistent with image. Also 'スポンサ' (without ー) appears in image for the stakeholder list: image shows 'スポンサ' without trailing ー in the stakeholder enumeration, but OCR writes 'スポンサー' with ー. Minor character-level discrepancy.

reviewer_notes: Content page covering WBSの最も小さい作業単位 (ワークパッケージ) and プロジェクトステークホルダマネジメント. All key definitions and the stakeholder enumeration (経営者, プロジェクトマネージャ, プロジェクトメンバー, 取引先, スポンサー, 株主, 地域社会) are faithfully reproduced. The 試験にはコレが出る summary box bullet points are all present and correct.
